sys_atf_step.description: Confirm that at least the following application menus are visible in Next Experience UI: Loaner Device Manager

test.display_value: Fulfiller can see the app menu

sys_update_version.name: sys_atf_step_e99b48a7839803105587fa96feaad3a4
